title: Sir_Potates Playing Cards
description: Explore the overworld making and using playing cards for pure power.
body:
Go through the overworld, collecting, making, using, and buying playing cards, These cards have powers that can be used on yourself, other players/Mobs, or both.

More cards are on the way, so stay tuned

V1.0 list

- 16 unique playing cards
- A blank card
- Card printer
- Common, Uncommon, and rare card packs
- Card Shop structure with Greg (pls be nice to Greg)
